- Static Edition

This page is a graphical representation of the text file docs/features.txt from the Mesa repository.

Although this text file is updated by the Mesa developers themselves, it might not contain an exhaustive list of each drivers features and subtleties. For more information, it is advised to look at the source code or ask the developers on their mailing list.

Feel free to open an issue or create a PR on GitHub, or join the Matrix room #mesamatrix:matrix.org.

Last commits

Age Commit message
2026-06-19 10:49 etnaviv: Support split sampler for 128-bit formats on the state path
2026-06-19 10:49 etnaviv: Advertise 128-bit color formats as renderable and samplable
2026-06-18 16:16 panvk: Advertise VK_EXT_rasterization_order_attachment_access
2026-06-15 13:29 pvr, pco: advertise support for VK_EXT_subgroup_size_control
2026-06-15 13:29 pvr: advertise VK_KHR_shader_subgroup_uniform_control_flow
2026-06-15 13:29 pvr, pco: add support for VK_KHR_shader_subgroup_rotate
2026-06-15 13:29 pvr: advertise VK_EXT_shader_subgroup_vote and vote feature
2026-06-15 13:29 pvr: advertise VK_EXT_shader_subgroup_ballot and ballot feature
2026-06-11 23:58 panvk: Advertise VK_KHR_compute_shader_derivatives
2026-06-11 00:23 nvk: Advertise VK_NV_shader_atomic_float16_vector
More...
